steps.name: Power BI Dataset
steps.description: The Power BI dataset connects directly to SAP FI and refreshes nightly from the GL.

steps.name: Refresh Validation Control
steps.description: Finance validates the refreshed dashboard totals against the GL trial balance each morning.

rationale: [PROPOSAL ruling, KTTL Chunk 2 reconciliation]: gap-answer steps follow the real gap order (per_type / template required-then-optional insertion order) -- System first, then Control, matching what DatasetValidator's close_gaps-style loop actually produces. Escalation (Stale Dashboard Escalation) and Known Issue deliberately have no gap-answer step: leaving the optional type Missing and one required type Partial unresolved keeps the dataset's final coverage below 100%, a more realistic worked example than a contrived full close.
note: DatasetValidator applies these two steps via services.graph_update.close_gap against a real running KVA, and records the measured coverage after each step in ground_truth/coverage_curve.json -- the target above is the real measured value, not illustrative.
